sheriff · local · v0

Welcome to Sheriff Desk

This is your local admin. Everything below runs against the local workspace — build portals, manage content, and push to Sheriff Cloud when you're ready.

Workspace
Local Sheriff

Quick actions

New page Add a page to any portal Upload media Images, files, and assets Build all Rebuild every portal now Edit theme Colors, fonts, and layout

New site

Name it, pick a theme, drop a logo, write a page — done in about a minute.

Pick a portal to load files.

Portals

Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens. Lives at name.localhost:5173 once built.

Detecting portals…

or drag & drop files anywhere in this area

Navigation

Your site's menus (nav.yall). Saving rebuilds the portal.

Set up a new site

Name your site

What should this site be called?

Your site will run at name.localhost:5173

Pick a theme

You can change this later.

Add a logo

Optional — drop an image or skip for now.

Drop an image here or

Write your first page

This becomes your home page. Keep it short — you can edit it any time.

Building your site

  • Upload logo
  • Write first page
  • Build site
